text:
in Gemini, or Virgo and is aspected by Jupiter, one will be trustworthy in the kings
circle, will possess all kinds of (good) qualities, be liked by good men and will earn wealth
through his virtues.
If Saturn is in Gemini, or Virgo and is aspected by Venus, one will be skilful in beautifying women,
be a teacher of Yogas, or a saint and be dear to the fair sex.
43-48. SATURN IN CANCER IN ASPECT TO OTHERS.
If Saturn occupies Cancer at birth and is aspected by the Sun, the native will lose his father in his
very boyhood be bereft of wealth, wife and happiness, will eat bad food and be sinful.
If Saturn is in Cancer and is aspected by the Moon, one will be a source of evil to his mother, be
wealthy and will be troubled by his co-born.
If Saturn is in Cancer and is aspected by Mars, one will enjoy kings wealth, be defective bodied,
will possess gold and gems, be endowed with a family and will have a bad group of relatives
and wife.
